summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planning Poker Node.js migration - all core functionality working correctly after backend port from Python/FastAPI to Node.js/Express

ui_bugs.issue: Login form doesn't redirect after successful authentication - stays on /auth page
ui_bugs.note: API login works correctly (verified via backend tests), but frontend form doesn't handle redirect properly

passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/) - Node.js server responding correctly
User signup flow with JWT token generation - Node.js auth working
User login flow with existing credentials (po@test.com) - Node.js auth working
Auth session validation (/api/auth/me) - JWT verification working
Room creation with authenticated user - Node.js room creation working
Room retrieval with stories (/api/rooms/{hash}) - Neon Postgres queries working
Story creation in room (PO only) - Node.js story management working
Story status updates (ready -> voting -> completed -> ready) - State management working
Vote submission during voting phase - Node.js voting system working
Average calculation correct (6.5 for votes of 5 and 8) - Math logic preserved
CSV export functionality - Node.js CSV generation working
Frontend landing page with Create/Join room cards - UI intact
Room page with split pane layout - Stories sidebar and voting area working
Guest join flow - name dialog and room access working
Fibonacci cards displayed correctly (1,2,3,5,8,13,21,?,∞,☕)
Vote table with participant cards showing correct votes and average
Join room functionality from landing page - navigation working
Share/Copy link functionality with toast notification
CSV export button correctly hidden from guest users (PO-only feature)
Voting cards correctly disabled when story is completed
WebSocket connection established (presence indicator working)
Real-time participant tracking (guest user shown in vote table)
Room hash validation and existing room access
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login form redirect issue - login API works but form doesn't navigate user after successful authentication

success_percentage.backend: 100% (14/14 API tests passed) - Node.js migration successful
